title: Rydberg State Physics: Giant Atoms for Quantum Computing
description: Explore the remarkable properties of Rydberg atoms - highly excited electronic states with extreme properties that enable strong, long-range interactions for quantum computing.
learningObjectives: Describe the quantum defect theory for alkali Rydberg states
Calculate Rydberg atom properties including orbital radius, binding energy, and lifetimes
Explain the scaling laws that make Rydberg atoms useful for quantum computing
Understand the van der Waals and dipole-dipole interactions between Rydberg atoms
Analyze Rydberg excitation schemes using one-photon and two-photon transitions
